purpose: Records route-level golden evidence requirements without promoting experimental routes prematurely.

samples.promotion_blocker: Needs a real PNG/JPG/SVG fixture and MinerU OCR text-retention evidence.
Legacy Office is intentionally out of scope (owner declined adaptation); convert to PDF or modern Office (.docx/.pptx/.xlsx) first.

Reproducible version-controlled fixture now ships (python/tests/golden/formats/media/transcript_zh_90s.txt, qwen3-asr Qwen3-ASR-1.7B on a 90s zh sample); verified promotion still needs deterministic or cross-sample ASR evidence because ASR output can vary across model versions.
samples.real_fixture_evidence: Real 90s zh audio (YouTube video 3DlXq9nsQOE, public) transcribed via qwen3-asr Qwen3-ASR-1.7B (cuda:0/bfloat16, RTX 4060 Ti); transcript committed at python/tests/golden/formats/media/transcript_zh_90s.txt (689-character zh transcript). Earlier dual-track manual acceptance on separate zh/en samples recorded transcripts entering cleanup + final outputs with 0 strict errors (see docs/development/asr-dual-track-acceptance.md).

samples.promotion_blocker: Real YouTube subtitle fixture now ships (subtitle_en_caQ2pfhoPcs.txt, video CAQ2pfhoPcs en auto subs via yt-dlp); verified promotion still needs broader real-network, timeout, dependency-variance, no-subtitle fallback, and transcript-quality evidence.
samples.real_fixture_evidence: Real YouTube subtitle downloaded via yt-dlp (project wrapper tool) for owner-designated test video CAQ2pfhoPcs (public, 'How I Turned Claude Into My Personal Assistant'); en auto subs cleaned to transcript committed at python/tests/golden/formats/youtube/subtitle_en_caQ2pfhoPcs.txt (1170-character excerpt from a 25166-character full transcript).

samples.promotion_blocker: MOBI is intentionally out of scope; convert to EPUB/PDF/Markdown/text first.
